research_sources.title: Returns to Buying Winners and Selling Losers
research_sources.claim: Intermediate-horizon relative strength motivates a testable momentum hypothesis.
research_sources.limitations: This study is not current-market, point-in-time, or net-cost evidence for this project.

research_sources.title: Simple Technical Trading Rules and the Stochastic Properties of Stock Returns
research_sources.claim: Trading-range break rules motivate testing a bounded new-high signal family.
research_sources.limitations: Historical index evidence does not establish implementability for current individual equities.

hypothesis: Eligible high-relative-volume US equities that extend above session VWAP, complete a first pullback, and reclaim with renewed volume may show positive cost-adjusted same-day continuation.
falsification_rule: Reject the immutable version when bounded out-of-sample and shadow evidence fail its registered cost-adjusted comparison and coverage requirements.
economic_mechanism: Underreaction and delayed participation may create a bounded continuation after renewed demand.
counterfactual_baseline: Matched eligible sessions without a first-pullback VWAP reclaim under the same data and cost contract.
